heading: About Me
paragraphs: I am a graduate student in Computer Information Systems at Florida Institute of Technology with a strong interest in software development, database systems, front end and backend architecture, enterprise Networking, Data Analytics, and practical problem-solving. My academic work and projects have helped me build experience across Java, Python, Swift, JavaScript, React, Express, MongoDB, and MySQL, Machine Learning, SDLC/Agile delivery, API Integration, UI Development, Engineering Management, and Data Visualization

What I enjoy most about technology is turning a problem into a structured system that is clear, usable, and efficient. Over time, my work has grown from academic programming assignments into larger projects such as desktop applications, architecture simulators, analytics-based reporting, and full-stack web applications connected to live databases.

This portfolio represents that progression. It shows how I approached frontend design, backend development, API integration, database connectivity, and deployment as one connected system rather than as separate tasks. My goal is to continue growing in roles related to software, systems, management, analytics, and technical problem-solving where I can contribute through both strong implementation and clear thinking.
